title: Student Aptitude Assessments
description: The results of aptitude assessments for students.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student aptitude assessment.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student taking the aptitude assessment.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.description: The aptitude assessment the student took.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Assessment.

assessedOn.title: Assessed On
assessedOn.description: The date on which the assessment occurred.

score.title: Score
score.description: The score the student received for the assessment.

oneOf.title: Literal
oneOf.description: The literal score the student received for the assessment.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of score specified for the assessment.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value of the score the student received for the assessment.

oneOf.title: Numeric
oneOf.description: The numeric score the student received for the assessment.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of score specified for the assessment.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value of the score the student received for the assessment.

percentiles.title: Percentiles
percentiles.description: The percentile values and types associated with the score.

value.title: Percentile Value
value.description: The percentile calculated for the score.

type.title: Percentile Type
type.description: The user defined type of the percentile.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Percentile Type.

form.title: Form
form.description: The name and number of the form used for the assessment for this result.

specialCircumstances.title: Special Circumstances
specialCircumstances.description: Special circumstances surrounding the taking of the assessment.

items.title: Special Circumstances
items.description: Special circumstances surrounding the taking of the assessment.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Special Circumstances.

update.title: Update
update.description: The update status of the student's assessment result.

preference.title: Preference
preference.description: An indicator that this result of the assessment are the preferred values for the assessment.

source.title: Source
source.description: The sources of the assessment results for the student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Source.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of this assessment results for the student.

reported.title: Reported
reported.description: An indicator of the nature of the assessment results.
